titleStmt.title: SII 26.782: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 782. (A.R. No. 731 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājādhirājadēva II: Year 13, Mēsha ba. [. .] Thursday. Pūraṭṭādi = 1176 A.D., March 11. The tithi was ba. 14 of Phālguṇa month.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the king as ‘who was pleased to take Īḻam and Madurai.’

It records an ubhayattīṭṭu (gift-deed) given to the executives of the temple of Śrī-Kayilāsam-uḍaiyār of Madurāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Poygaināḍu, by the Śivabrāhmaṇas having the right of worship in the 30-day circle of the temple. It is stated that from among them, some had left the place and that their right of worship should be distributed amongst those Śivabrāhmaṇas who remained there. The temple gave these people 448-1/4 kāśu in this connection. It is stated that with this money the Śivabrāhmaṇas got 32 cows and one bull and from the ghee derived from their yield, the Śivabrāhmaṇas had agreed to burn two nandā lamps in the temple. It is stated that each cow costs 13-1/2 kāśu plus 1-3/4 mā kāśu, and that 91-1/4 nāḻi of ghee for 365 days at 2-3/4 nāḻi plus 4 śeviḍu per cow per day was required for burning the two lamps perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ yiḻamum maturaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu
10 3Āvatu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti nāḷ
vaṭakarai rājarājavaḷanāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭu śrīmaturāntakacaturvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār śrī
kayilāsamuṭaiyār koyil śrīkāryyam ciṟukoṭṭaiyūṟ poṉṉampalanampikkum śrīmāheśva
rakaṇkāṇi pa kkum tevarkanmi rājarājapaṭṭanukkum koyil kaṇakku velūruṭai
yil muppatu vaṭṭattuk kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Upaiyattiṭ
ṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷile cila civappirāmaṇar kuṭiyoṭi Iṉṉāḷ varaiyum kuṭi pukutā
te nikkaiyil nāḷopātiyāl lupaiyameṟṟi nilainiṉṟa veṅkaḷukke celutta ve
ṇṭukaiyil Ivvupaiyattiṭṭukku nāṅkaḷ śrīpaṇṭārattu koṇṭu kaṭamaiyāṉa kācu
4 100 4 10 8(1/4) Ikkācu nānūṟṟunāṟpatteṭṭe kāluṅ koṇṭu Ikkoyilukku patiṉmunṟāvatu
cittirai viṣu Iru nantā viḷakku Erikka kaṭavomāka koṇṭu kācu 8 100 3 10
Avakkup pacuvonṟukkuk kācu patiṉmunṟaraiye yorumā mukkāṇiyāka Ipporuḷāl kaṭava
pacu muppattiraṇṭu Iṣapa O(m)(n)nṟumāka 3 10 3 Ippacu Uru muppattu munṟukkum pacu vonṟu
kku ney Irunāḻi muvuḻakku 1 nāṟceviṭāka vanta ney nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟupattañcukku ney
toṇṇūṟṟoru nāḻi Uḻakku Āka vanta neyyāle tirununtā viḷakkuc cantirātittavaṟ Erikka
kkaṭavo muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇarom Ikkalveṭṭu vittārivūrirukku māṇṭār
lilādicaṇḍeśvarappiḷḷaiyāṟku panmāheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 26.782 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
